heading: Limit on amount recoverable on voyage
label: 11111 Limit on amount recoverable on voyage
text: When a seaman is on a voyage on which a written agreement is required under this part, not more than $1 is recoverable from the seaman by a person for a debt incurred by the seaman during the voyage for which the seaman is signed on until the voyage is ended.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1111146:602Section 11111 limits the amount of money recoverable from a seaman for a debt incurred while on a voyage on which a shipping agreement is required.
